div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in the Netherlands (Tobin)
div.p: 58. Your no. 64, November 22, 6 p.m. The Department is gratified to learn that the Cabinet has decided unanimously to recommend the acceptance of the proposed convention. You are informed confidentially that our negotiations with Great Britain are believed to be proceeding favorably; the Department will advise you promptly regarding the progress of those negotiations.

In your own negotiations with the Government of the Netherlands you will be sure that the change amending the text contained in the
Department’s no. 52, October 22, (see Department’s no. 34 [54], November 7, repeated to you from LondonSee footnote 58, p. 208.) is incorporated.
